flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hill College rose 50% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.4k → $3.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hill College fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (15.1% → 11.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hill College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 2.3k).
